generated_oml:
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures hoist swinging motion"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures wind speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time swing angle measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time wind speed measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance HistoricalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Historical crane state data stored in TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted, WindSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD model of gantry crane created in Autodesk Fusion360"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AutodeskFusion360
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model for crane trajectory generation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonGantrylibModule
]

instance SimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulation model for trajectory validation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonGantrylibModule
]

instance DockerContainerization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerizes DT components for scalable deployment"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService, SimulationService, ContinuousValidationService, HistoricalDataLoggingService, GrafanaVisualizationService, FaultLocalizationService
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database for historical data storage and querying"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService, GrafanaVisualizationService, FaultLocalizationService
]

instance Grafana : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data visualization tool for real-time monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:enables GrafanaVisualizationService
]

instance EclipseMosquittoMQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker for real-time data transmission"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance PythonGantrylibModule : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python module for gantry crane control and trajectory planning"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService, SimulationService, FaultLocalizationService
]

instance AutodeskFusion360 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "CAD software for creating and managing crane models"
]

instance SystemModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Performs system modeling using Capella Arcadia models"
]

instance CapellaArcadiaModels : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Based Systems Engineering using Capella Arcadia models"
    DTDFVocab:enables SystemModelingService
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates optimal crane movement trajectories using kinematic model"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectoryPlanningInsight
]

instance SimulationValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation results for trajectory validation"
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulates crane trajectory for validation"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationValidationInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Compares real measurements with simulations for continuous validation"
    DTDFVocab:provides ContinuousValidationAlertsAction
]

instance HistoricalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights from historical data stored in TimescaleDB"
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Logs historical data to TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
]

instance DataVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Data visualizations from Grafana dashboards"
]

instance GrafanaVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visualizes data using Grafana dashboards"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataVisualizationInsight
]

instance FaultLocalizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Performs fault localization using time series classification techniques"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultLocalizationInsight
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryPlanningInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Determines optimal crane movement trajectories"
]

instance FaultLocalizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identifies faults using time series classification techniques"
]

instance ContinuousValidationAlertsAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Prompts operator actions based on validation discrepancies"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance CartMotorController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "TMC4671-Eval controller for cart movement"
]

instance HoistMotorController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "TMC4671-Eval controller for hoisting movement"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet for picking up containers"
]

instance CraneFrame : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Structural frame of the lab-scale gantry crane system"
]

instance CartStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Stepper motor for cart movement"
]

instance HoistStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Stepper motor for hoisting movement"
]

instance ArduinoMeasurementControlUnit : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Arduino-based unit for sensor data collection and control"
]

instance PowerSupplyUnit : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Power supply unit for the gantry crane system"
]

instance GantryCraneSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Lab-scale gantry crane system inspired by harbor cranes in Antwerp port"
    base:contains CraneFrame, CartStepperMotor, HoistStepperMotor, CartMotorController, HoistMotorController, Electromagnet, SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer, ArduinoMeasurementControlUnit, PowerSupplyUnit
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands generated by the Trajectory Generator Service and executed via the Control Application, sent through the Physical Crane Interface to motor controllers for movement execution."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous real-time synchronization; measurements and simulations are compared continuously with distance metrics calculated against thresholds, and data is logged in real-time."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Centralized system integrating physical components (crane, interface, control app, logging app, HMI) and digital components (database, dashboard, trajectory generator, simulation, validation, MQTT broker) via MQTT communication and Docker deployment on a single PC."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Designed (CAD models in Autodesk Fusion360), manufactured (physical hardware components), and operated (real-time data logging, validation during crane operation)."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous validation service compares executed trajectory measurements with simulations, calculates distance metrics against thresholds; model validation methods reused from [5] for verification."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol (Eclipse Mosquitto) for inter-service communication; Physical Crane Interface connects to hardware controllers via proprietary or unspecified protocol."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Docker containerized Database, MQTT Broker, and Dashboard; Python gantrylib module installed via pip; deployed on a single personal computer."
]
